description: Request cached inference matching a task description. Send as a campfire future (--future flag); the exchange fulfills with exchange:match. Budget is the maximum scrip the buyer will spend. Domain tags are composed as exchange:domain:<value> from the domain arg.

args.name: task
args.description: Description of the task the buyer needs solved. Used for semantic similarity matching against inventory.

args.name: budget
args.description: Maximum scrip the buyer will spend (in token-cost units). Exchange must not present matches priced above this budget.

args.name: min_reputation
args.description: Minimum seller reputation score (0-100). Default: 0 (no filter).

args.name: freshness_hours
args.description: Maximum age of cached inference in hours. Default: no limit.

args.name: domain
args.description: Domain tags to narrow search (e.g. 'go', 'terraform', 'security'). Each value composed into exchange:domain:<value> tag.
